name: sunny
description: Project Sunny — AI therapeutic learning companion

scripts.sunny:homework: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true npm run build && cd .. && ADVENTURE_MAP=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=homework npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:homework:preview: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true VITE_PREVIEW_MODE=free npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_PREVIEW_MODE=free SUNNY_SUBJECT=homework ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:homework: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true VITE_PREVIEW_MODE=free npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_MODE=diag SUNNY_CHILD=ila SUNNY_SUBJECT=homework ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:rewards: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true VITE_REWARD_DIAG=true npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_MODE=diag SUNNY_CHILD=ila ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts

scripts.sunny:mode:diag:pronunciation:sunny-mode: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_MODE=diag SUNNY_SUBJECT=pronunciation ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:pronunciation:as-ila: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_MODE=as-child SUNNY_CHILD=ila SUNNY_SUBJECT=pronunciation ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:math: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_MODE=diag SUNNY_SUBJECT=math ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:math:as-ila: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_MODE=as-child SUNNY_CHILD=ila SUNNY_SUBJECT=math ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.test: vitest run && cd web && npm run test
scripts.sunny: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:adventure: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true npm run build && cd .. && ADVENTURE_MAP=true npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:companion: cd web && VITE_COMPANION_DIAG=true npm run build && cd .. && npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:reading: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_SUBJECT=reading npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:math: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && SUNNY_SUBJECT=math npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts

scripts.sunny:mode:diag: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true VITE_DIAG_CHILD_ID=creator npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=diag npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:mode:diag:reading: cd web && VITE_ADVENTURE_MAP=true VITE_DIAG_CHILD_ID=creator VITE_DIAG_READING=true npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=true SUNNY_SUBJECT=diag npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts

scripts.sunny:mode:diag:mute: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false SUNNY_SUBJECT=diag npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.dev:live: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "green,magenta" "npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
